summary: This week's strongest signal is repeated overperformance from BTS short-form clips. Next week should test whether the same raw format can reproduce engagement uplift across TikTok and Instagram.

final_experiments.title: BTS face-first hook test edited
final_experiments.hook: Open with a close-up reaction in the first 2 seconds.
final_experiments.cta: Ask fans to comment which practice moment they want next.
final_experiments.production_brief: Use raw rehearsal footage, minimal polish, subtitles on-screen.
